a.label: channel-density polynomial
a.standard_term: bordered-minor expansion of elementary symmetric curvature invariants of the shape operator

b.label: Self/coupling Hessian split H = H_c + H_s
b.standard_term: diagonal-plus-hollow (diagonal / zero-diagonal) matrix decomposition of the Hessian

evidence.label: Channel-density polynomial Ĉ_r(t,u)
evidence.summary:
Ĉ_r(t,u) = (−1)^{r+1} Σ_{|I|=r+1}  det [ 0    g_Iᵀ ]
                                       [ g_I  (t·H_c + u·H_s)_I ]
`Ĉ_r` is homogeneous of degree `r` in `(t,u)`. Expand
Ĉ_r(t,u) = Σ_{p+q=r} t^p u^q · κ̂_{r;p,q}.

evidence.label: Curvature-channel projection (channel-density polynomial, no
evidence.summary:
For a hypersurface relation $F=0$ at a regular point set $g=\nabla F$, $H=\nabla^2F$, $q=g^{\mathsf T}g\ne0$. In the distinguished coordinate basis split
\[
H=H_c+H_s,\qquad H_s=\operatorname{diag}(H),\qquad H_c=H-H_s .
